channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jon Scheyer, a Chicagoland prep basketball legend, going for 3rd national title with Duke
item.description: Jon Scheyer is two victories shy of winning his third NCAA Division I national championship with the storied Duke men's basketball program: one as a player, one as an assistant coach, and — with wins in San Antonio on Saturday and Monday — one as a head coach.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Overall ski champion Brignone breaks her leg in crash at Italian championships
item.description: Freshly crowned overall World Cup skiing champion Federica Brignone has broken multiple bones in her left leg during a giant slalom crash at the Italian championships.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: FIFA's Infantino points to US hosting 2031 Women's World Cup and UK getting 2035 edition
item.description: The United States and the United Kingdom looked set on Thursday to be picked by FIFA next year as hosts of Women’s World Cups expanded to 48 teams from 32. Their respective intentions to bid for the 2031 and 2035 editions are alone in the contests after a first deadline to enter the race passed.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Houston blows past the Jazz, 143-105
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - The end of the season can't come soon enough for the Utah Jazz. Jalen Green scored 22 points, while Alperen Sengun was one assist away from a triple-double, as the Houston Rockets crushed the Jazz Wednesday night, 143-105.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Teaching Chicago's hard-working values, basketball legend Tom Kleinschmidt builds a dynasty at DePaul Prep
item.description: DePaul College Prep's boys' basketball team, coached by Tom Kleinschmidt, has won three consecutive IHSA championships, thanks to his hard work, discipline, and respect, which he learned growing up on the city's Northwest Side.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lowe, WGN 9

item.title: NFL star Trey Hendrickson rips Bengals' brass over 'poor' communication during contract negotiations
item.description: Trey Hendrickson took exception to Bengals executive Katie Blackburn's public remarks about contract negotiations. The pass rusher said Blackburn's comments were "disappointing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ovechkin scores his 892nd career goal. He needs 2 to tie Gretzky and 3 to break the NHL record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin moved three goals away from breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record with No. 892 in the Washington Capitals’ game at the Carolina Hurricanes on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Paige Spiranac touts fitness transformation while firing back at critic
item.description: Golf influencer Paige Spiranac showed off her fitness transformation while she clapped back at a critical comment on social media Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Curry hits 12 3-pointers, scores 52 as Warriors defeat Grizzlies 134-125
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Stephen Curry had 52 points, including 12 3-pointers, as the Golden State Warriors held on for a 134-125 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Maryland strikes quickly, hires Texas A&M's Buzz Williams after Kevin Willard's exit
item.description: Maryland moved on quickly after Kevin Willard's departure, hiring another coach with plenty of experience at a high level. Buzz Williams is changing jobs again.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Padres pick up another win, making for single best start to season ever
item.description: The San Diego Padres have made history after beating the Cleveland Guardians 7-2 at Petco Park on Monday, giving them a five-game winning streak to start the season for the first time ever.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Lee Cummard named BYU women's basketball coach
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU has named Lee Cummard as its next women's basketball head coach. Cummard has been the interim head coach since Amber Whiting resigned after three seasons on March 8.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 5 players, 2 coaches ejected after Pistons-Timberwolves skirmish in 2nd quarter
item.description: Five players and two coaches were ejected after a fight broke out in the second quarter in the Minnesota Timberwolves' victory over the Detroit Pistons on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK DONNELLY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Diamondbacks rally for 8 runs in the eighth to beat the Cubs 10-6, split 4-game series
item.description: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. hit a game-tying, two-run homer, Josh Naylor had the go-ahead RBI double and the Arizona Diamondbacks used an eight-run eighth inning to rally past the Chicago Cubs 10-6 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Min Woo Lee holds off Scheffler and Woodland to win Houston Open for first PGA Tour title
item.description: Min Woo Lee kept his calm amid tremendous charges by Scottie Scheffler and Gary Woodland, winning the Houston Open on Sunday for his first PGA Tour title with the best lag of his life that set up a final par for a one-shot victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: RSL gets shut out again at Minnesota United, 2-0
item.description: ST. PAUL (ABC4 Sports) - For the second straight game, and third overall this MLS season, Real Salt Lake failed to score a goal in a 2-0 shutout at Minnesota United Saturday night. Tani Oluwaseyi recorded a brace to help Minnesota United hand Real Salt Lake its fourth loss of the season. Dayne St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr. rallies Florida into Final Four with 84-79 March Madness win over Texas Tech
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Coach Todd Golden cut the final strand of the net, waved it to the crowd and performed the famed Gator Chomp. A celebration that seemed completely improbable just a few minutes earlier was in high gear. Florida is heading back to the Final Four. Walter Clayton Jr.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hailey Van Lith scores 26 points to lead TCU to 1st Elite Eight with 71-62 win over Notre Dame
item.description: TCU is in unchartered territory thanks to Hailey Van Lith, reaching the Elite Eight for the first time.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Golden Knights overcome Donato's hat trick to beat Blackhawks 5-3 for 5th straight win
item.description: Pavel Dorofeyev scored a power-play goal with 3:10 left to snap a tie, and the Vegas Golden Knights rallied for their fifth straight win, 5-3 over the Chicago Blackhawks on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC loses to defending champs in OT, 2-1
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) - Sam Bennett scored his second goal of the game off an assist from Brad Marchand at 4:18 of overtime to give the Florida Panthers a 2-1 win over the Utah Hockey Club at Amerant Bank Arena on Friday. By earning one point, Utah is now nine points behind St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fans chant 'sell the team' at Rays home opener; team owner says talks are nothing new
item.description: The Rays pulled out a win in their new home for the season at Steinbrenner Field, but the ball club's future in Tampa Bay remains uncertain.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: CF Montreal seeks first win of the season, visits the Chicago Fire
item.description: CF Montreal (0-4-1) vs. Chicago Fire (3-1-1) Chicago; Saturday, 8:30 p.m. EDT BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Chicago -175, Montreal +429, Draw +308; over/under is 2.5 goals BOTTOM LINE: CF Montreal seeks its first victory of the season when it visits the Chicago Fire.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Padres rally in seventh inning to win home opener against Braves
item.description: The Padres kicked off the 2025-2026 season with a comeback victory over the Atlanta Braves Thursday at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: New San Diego Padres mural in North Park nears completion
item.description: A new San Diego Padres-themed mural in North Park replacing a previous work of public art that had been defaced earlier this year by fans of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers is nearing completion, just in time for opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Royal Riot Podcast Exclusive: Ariath Piol talks goals, red cards, and his journey to RSL
item.description: Royal Riot Podcast hosts Hayden and Mattey sit down with Ariath Piol in an exclusive interview where the player opens up about his journey to RSL, the emotions, lessons, and support he has received from the club and more.
item.dc:creator: Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4
